# AI Paper · 双语论文阅读站

> 著名 AI 学者与他们的里程碑论文——逐段中英对照全文 + 图/公式/附录 + 核心贡献 + 被引数 + 论文问答。A bilingual reading site of famous AI scholars and their landmark papers — paragraph-by-paragraph English↔Chinese full text, figures/equations, key contributions, citation counts, and paper Q&A.

站点: https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/
规模: 232 位学者 / 532 篇论文
每篇静态页含: 双语摘要、核心贡献、局限、章节;互动版含逐段中英对照全文 + 图/公式 + 单篇/全站问答。

## 学者 Scholars
- [Anthropic / Anthropic](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/anthropic/): AI safety lab (Claude); interpretability & alignment — 22 篇
- [OpenAI / OpenAI](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/openai/): Frontier AI lab (GPT / DALL·E / Codex) — 17 篇
- [DeepSeek-AI / 深度求索](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/deepseek/): Frontier open-model lab, China — 14 篇
- [Song Han / 韩松](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/songhan/): Associate Professor, MIT — 11 篇
- [Jie Tang / 唐杰](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/jietang/): Professor, Tsinghua University; Zhipu AI / GLM — 10 篇
- [Junyang Lin / 林俊旸](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/junyanglin/): Lead, Qwen Team, Alibaba — 9 篇
- [Zhilin Yang / 杨植麟](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/zhilinyang/): Founder & CEO, Moonshot AI (Kimi); XLNet lead author — 9 篇
- [Dario Amodei / 达里奥·阿莫迪](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/dario/): CEO, Anthropic — 9 篇
- [Xingwu Sun / 孙兴武](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/xingwusun/): Lead Researcher, Hunyuan Team, Tencent — 8 篇
- [An Yang / 杨安](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/anyang/): Researcher, Qwen Team, Alibaba — 8 篇
- [Robin Rombach / 罗宾·罗姆巴赫](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/rrombach/): Co-founder, Black Forest Labs (formerly Stability AI / CompVis) — 8 篇
- [Aaron Grattafiori / Aaron Grattafiori](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/aarongrattafiori/): Research Lead, Meta AI (Llama) — 8 篇
- [Ross Girshick / 罗斯·吉尔希克](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/rgirshick/): Research Scientist, Meta AI (FAIR) — 8 篇
- [Alec Radford / 亚历克·拉德福德](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/aradford/): Researcher, OpenAI (DCGAN, GPT, CLIP) — 8 篇
- [Demis Hassabis / 杰米斯·哈萨比斯](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/demis/): CEO, Google DeepMind — 7 篇
- [Albert Q. Jiang / 蒋启天](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/aqjiang/): Research Scientist, Mistral AI — 7 篇
- [Junnan Li / 李俊男](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/junnanli/): Research Scientist (BLIP/BLIP-2 author), formerly Salesforce Research — 7 篇
- [Tero Karras / 泰罗·卡拉斯](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/tkarras/): Distinguished Research Scientist, NVIDIA Research — 7 篇
- [Yu Gao / 高宇](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/yugao/): ByteDance Seed, image & video generation — 6 篇
- [Jim Fan / 范麟熙](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/jimfan/): Senior Research Scientist, NVIDIA — 6 篇
- [Sam Altman / 萨姆·奥尔特曼](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/sam/): Co-founder & CEO, OpenAI — 6 篇
- [Noam Shazeer / 诺姆·沙泽尔](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/shazeer/): Co-lead, Google Gemini — 6 篇
- [Xinlong Wang / 王鑫龙](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/xinlongwang/): Research Scientist, BAAI (Beijing Academy of AI) — 6 篇
- [Tri Dao / 特里·道](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/tridao/): Chief Scientist, Together AI; Professor, Princeton — 5 篇
- [Wenhai Wang / 王文海](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/wenhaiwang/): Researcher (InternVL), Shanghai AI Lab / CUHK — 5 篇
- [Yuntao Bai / 白云涛](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/ybai/): Research Scientist, Anthropic — 5 篇
- [Satya Nadella / 萨提亚·纳德拉](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/satya/): Chairman & CEO, Microsoft — 4 篇
- [Yejin Choi / 崔艺珍](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/yejin/): Professor, Stanford University; Senior Director, NVIDIA — 4 篇
- [Junjie Yan / 闫俊杰](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/yanjunjie/): Founder & CEO, MiniMax — 4 篇
- [Andrej Karpathy / 安德烈·卡帕西](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/karpathy/): Founder, Eureka Labs; ex-OpenAI, ex-Tesla AI — 4 篇
- [StepFun / 阶跃星辰](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/stepfun/): StepFun, multimodal generation — 4 篇
- [Google DeepMind / 谷歌 DeepMind](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/deepmind/): AI research lab (Gemini, AlphaFold, AlphaGo) — 4 篇
- [Oriol Vinyals / 奥里奥尔·维尼亚尔斯](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/oriol/): VP of Research, Google DeepMind; Gemini co-lead — 4 篇

- [Qiying Yu / 于琪颖](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/qiyingyu/): ByteDance Seed / Tsinghua, RL for reasoning — 3 篇
- [Martin Wright / 马丁·赖特](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/pp/martinwright/): Independent Designer · ex-Head of Design, TPXimpact — 3 篇

## 高被引论文 Most-cited papers
- [Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/kaiming-1512.03385/) — Kaiming He, Microsoft, 被引 231533
- [Attention Is All You Need](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/shazeer-1706.03762/) — Noam Shazeer, Google, 被引 183094
- [Adam: A Method for Stochastic Optimization](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/dkingma-1412.6980/) — Diederik P. Kingma, U. Amsterdam, 被引 167990
- [BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/jdevlin-1810.04805/) — Jacob Devlin, Google, 被引 117033
- [Very Deep Convolutional Networks for Large-Scale Image Recognition](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/ksimonyan-1409.1556/) — Karen Simonyan, Oxford, 被引 112467
- [U-Net: Convolutional Networks for Biomedical Image Segmentation](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/oronneberger-1505.04597/) — Olaf Ronneberger, University of Freiburg, 被引 97700
- [Faster R-CNN: Towards Real-Time Object Detection with Region Proposal Networks](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/rgirshick-1506.01497/) — Ross Girshick, Microsoft, 被引 73697
- [An Image is Worth 16x16 Words: Transformers for Image Recognition at Scale](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/adosovitskiy-2010.11929/) — Alexey Dosovitskiy, Google, 被引 65359
- [Language Models are Few-Shot Learners](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/tombrown-2005.14165/) — Tom Brown, OpenAI, 被引 60219
- [Language Models are Few-Shot Learners](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/aradford-2005.14165/) — Alec Radford, OpenAI, 被引 60219
- [XGBoost: A Scalable Tree Boosting System](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/tianqi-1603.02754/) — Tianqi Chen, U. Washington, 被引 56641
- [Microsoft COCO: Common Objects in Context](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/tsungyilin-1405.0312/) — Tsung-Yi Lin, Microsoft, 被引 53675
- [Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/aradford-2103.00020/) — Alec Radford, OpenAI, 被引 51496
- [Going Deeper with Convolutions](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/cszegedy-1409.4842/) — Christian Szegedy, Google, 被引 47539
- [Batch Normalization: Accelerating Deep Network Training by Reducing Internal Covariate Shift](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/cszegedy-1502.03167/) — Christian Szegedy, Google, 被引 47103
- [You Only Look Once: Unified, Real-Time Object Detection](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/jredmon-1506.02640/) — Joseph Redmon, U. Washington, 被引 46352
- [Densely Connected Convolutional Networks](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/gaohuang-1608.06993/) — Gao Huang, Cornell University, 被引 43760
- [ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/feifei-1409.0575/) — Fei-Fei Li, Stanford, 被引 43007
- [Semi-Supervised Classification with Graph Convolutional Networks](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/tkipf-1609.02907/) — Thomas Kipf, U. Amsterdam, 被引 35801
- [Distributed Representations of Words and Phrases and their Compositionality](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/tmikolov-1310.4546/) — Tomas Mikolov, Google, 被引 35367
- [Efficient Estimation of Word Representations in Vector Space](https://aipaper.jasonlin.tech/p/jeffdean-1301.3781/) — Jeff Dean, Google, 被引 34590
